content.speakerText: Good morning, can you confirm your name and thesis title?
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好，请确认一下你的名字和论文题目？

options.text: Hi, I'm Li Wei. My thesis is about AI.
Good morning, Professor Smith. I'm Li Wei, and my thesis is 'AI in Higher Education'.
Li Wei. Thesis: AI. That's it.
My name is Li Wei, but I'm not sure about the title right now.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了完整的正式表达：问候语、教授称谓、全名和完整论文标题，符合学术答辩的规范。选项1过于简略，缺少正式称谓；选项3省略关键信息，显得不专业；选项4表现出不确定，不符合答辩者应展现的自信与准备充分的形象。

content.speakerText: Thanks for coming in today. Ready to get started?
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢今天到场，准备好了吗？

options.text: I guess so... I hope I don't mess up.
Yes, I'm fully prepared and excited to present my research.
I'm not sure if I'm ready yet. Can we wait a few minutes?

content.explanation: 正确答案既表达了准备充分，又展现了积极态度，语言正式且自信。选项1和4表现出犹豫和不自信，不符合答辩情境；选项3虽简洁，但用词过于口语化（'Let's go'），在正式学术场合不够得体。

content.speakerText: Welcome, Mr. Li. We're looking forward to your presentation. Could you please state your full name and research focus?
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎你，李先生。我们期待你的展示。能否请你说一下你的全名和研究重点？

options.text: I'm Li Wei. I work on AI.
Good morning. My full name is Li Wei, and my research focuses on the application of artificial intelligence in higher education institutions.
Li Wei. AI in schools. That's my thing.
I think my name is on the list. My topic is kinda about AI.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了完整、正式的表达，包含问候语、全名和清晰的研究重点描述，符合学术场合规范。选项1和3过于简略、口语化；选项4使用模糊词汇（'kinda', 'I think'）和不专业表达，削弱了可信度。
